packs.title: Client Relations Lifecycle
packs.description: Practice client-facing vocabulary from initial contact to delivery

stages.prompt: You're reaching out to a new potential client. Tell them you'd like to arrange a business meeting.

modelAnswer.japanese: 商談の機会をいただけますでしょうか。
modelAnswer.kana: しょうだんのきかいをいただけますでしょうか。
modelAnswer.english: Could we have an opportunity for a business discussion?

stages.hint: 商談 (しょうだん) — business negotiation/meeting

stages.prompt: After the meeting, you need to send an estimate. Tell your client you'll send a quotation.

modelAnswer.japanese: 見積もりをお送りします。
modelAnswer.kana: みつもりをおおくりします。
modelAnswer.english: I will send you a quotation.

stages.hint: 見積もり (みつもり) — quotation/estimate

stages.prompt: The client accepted your proposal. Tell them you'll prepare the contract.

modelAnswer.japanese: 契約書を準備いたします。
modelAnswer.kana: けいやくしょをじゅんびいたします。

stages.prompt: The product is ready. Tell the client you'll deliver the product.
stages.hint: 納品 (のうひん) — delivery of goods

stages.prompt: After delivery, you need to follow up. Tell the client you'll do a follow-up.

modelAnswer.japanese: 後日フォローアップさせていただきます。
modelAnswer.kana: ごじつフォローアップさせていただきます。
modelAnswer.english: I will do a follow-up at a later date.

packs.title: Finance & Expenses
packs.description: Practice expense reporting and reimbursement workflow

stages.prompt: You had a business lunch and need to claim it. Tell your manager it's a business expense.

modelAnswer.japanese: 経費として申請します。
modelAnswer.kana: けいひとしてしんせいします。
modelAnswer.english: I will claim it as a business expense.

stages.prompt: You need proof for the expense. Ask if they can provide a receipt.

modelAnswer.japanese: 領収書をいただけますか。
modelAnswer.kana: りょうしゅうしょをいただけますか。

stages.hint: 領収書 (りょうしゅうしょ) — official receipt

stages.prompt: You're submitting your expenses. Tell your manager you'll submit an application form.

modelAnswer.kana: しんせいしょをていしゅつします。
modelAnswer.english: I will submit the application form.

stages.prompt: Your expenses need manager approval. Ask your manager to approve them.

modelAnswer.japanese: ご承認をお願いします。
modelAnswer.kana: ごしょうにんをおねがいします。

stages.prompt: After approval, the accounting department will process it. Tell them to settle the expenses.

modelAnswer.japanese: 経費を精算してください。
modelAnswer.kana: けいひをせいさんしてください。
